mapper.select:
SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_price), 0) FROM user_order WHERE order_status IN (1, 2, 3) AND payment_status = 1) AS total_sales,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()) AS today_new_users,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_order WHERE order_status = 1) AS pending_orders,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM merchant WHERE status = 2) AS active_merchants

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COALESCE(SUM(total_price), 0) AS sales_amount, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM user_order WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND order_status IN (1, 2, 3) AND payment_status = 1 GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY DATE(created_at)

WITH daily_stats AS ( SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS daily_new_users FROM user WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ), cumulative_stats AS ( SELECT ds.date, ds.daily_new_users, SUM(ds.daily_new_users) OVER (ORDER BY ds.date) AS cumulative_users FROM daily_stats ds ) SELECT cs.date, cs.daily_new_users AS new_user_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE DATE(created_at) <= cs.date) AS total_user_count FROM cumulative_stats cs ORDER BY cs.date
